summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Medicine Detail page. All features verified: breadcrumb navigation (INVENTORY > CATEGORY in teal), product header with name/manufacturer/pack info, Edit button (teal), 6 stats cards (GST%, Stock, HSN, MRP, Schedule, Composition), 6 tabs (Batches, Purchases, Pur. Return, Sales, Sales Return, Ledger), batches table with all columns, Hide Zero quantity checkbox, Delete Batches button (red outline), Print QR button (teal), expiry highlighting (orange for nearing), Margin% in teal, footer with batch count and status legend.

frontend: Login with testadmin@pharmacy.com/admin123 works
Navigate from Inventory search page to Medicine Detail by clicking row
Medicine Detail page URL: /inventory/product/:sku
Breadcrumb shows INVENTORY > CATEGORY in teal (#00CED1)
Breadcrumb INVENTORY link navigates back to /inventory
Product header shows name, manufacturer/brand, pack info
Edit button (teal) with edit icon present
Stats cards: GST (%), STOCK (qty), HSN, MRP (₹), SCHEDULE, COMPOSITION
6 tabs present: Batches, Purchases, Pur. Return, Sales, Sales Return, Ledger
Batches tab active by default with teal underline
Batches table columns: Batch ID, Qty., Exp. Date, MRP, Prev. MRP, PTR, Disc. (%), LP, Margin%
Batch row shows data: BTN002 with 150 qty, 06/25 expiry (orange highlight), ₹25.00 MRP
Prev. MRP shows strikethrough styling
Margin% displayed in teal color (20.00%)
Hide Zero quantity checkbox works (toggles and re-fetches data)
Delete Batches button with red outline present
Print QR button with teal background present
Footer shows batch count ('Showing X batch/batches')
Status legend in footer: Active (green), Nearing Expiry (3m) (orange), Expired (red)
Purchases tab shows 'Purchase History' placeholder content
Ledger tab shows Stock Ledger table with movement data
Ledger table columns: Date & Time, Type, Batch, Qty Change, Reason, Reference, By
Ledger shows opening_stock entries with +50 qty changes in green
Teal/cyan (#00CED1) theme color used consistently throughout

critical_code_review_comments: MedicineDetail.js implements all required features correctly
Navigation from InventorySearch.js row click works via navigate(`/inventory/product/${product.product.sku}`)
Route /inventory/product/:sku defined in App.js correctly routes to MedicineDetail component
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Expiry date highlighting logic correctly identifies nearing expiry (within 90 days) and expired batches
Margin calculation: ((MRP - CostPrice) / MRP) * 100 implemented correctly
Hide Zero quantity checkbox triggers re-fetch of batches with filter
Ledger tab fetches stock movements for all batches of the product
Teal/cyan theme (#00CED1) applied consistently to buttons, tabs, margins, breadcrumbs
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing TEST002 product with batch BTN002.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Medicine Detail page fully tested at /inventory/product/:sku. Key test product: TEST002 (SKU) with batch BTN002 showing 150 qty, 06/25 expiry. All 6 tabs work, Ledger tab shows actual stock movement history. Navigation from InventorySearch page row click to detail page verified. Breadcrumb navigation back to /inventory verified. Test credentials: testadmin@pharmacy.com/admin123. Use data-testid selectors for form filling.
